test_cases.description: Verify selecting a start and end date on the calendar returns matching records.
test_cases.expected_result: Start Date and End Date fields populate with the selected dates, and the table refreshes to show only invoices dated within the selected range.
test_cases.actual_result: Table displayed records within the 06/01/2026-07/11/2026 range as expected.
test_cases.comments: Filter keys off Date Created, not Payment Date - one record shown has Payment Date outside range but Date Created within range. Verified via screenshot.

test_cases.description: Verify filtering works when both start and end dates fall in the same month.
test_cases.expected_result: Table shows only invoices dated within that same-month range.
test_cases.actual_result: Table displayed only records within 06/01/2026-06/30/2026 as expected.
test_cases.comments: Verified via screenshot showing 3 matching records.

test_cases.description: Verify filtering works when the range spans two different months.
test_cases.expected_result: Table shows all invoices dated within the full cross-month range, not just one month.
test_cases.actual_result: Table displayed records spanning June-July range correctly.

test_cases.description: Verify selecting the same day twice filters to that single date.
test_cases.expected_result: Table shows only invoices dated exactly on that day.
test_cases.actual_result: Table displayed only the 2 records dated exactly 06/20/2026.
test_cases.comments: Verified via screenshot showing single-day filter result.

test_cases.description: Verify a record dated exactly on the selected Start Date is included.
test_cases.expected_result: The record on the Start Date is included in results (inclusive).
test_cases.actual_result: Record dated 06/20/2026 (Start Date) was included in the 06/20/2026-07/10/2026 range results.
test_cases.comments: Boundary check confirmed inclusive on Start Date.

test_cases.description: Verify a record dated exactly on the selected End Date is included.
test_cases.expected_result: The record on the End Date is included in results (inclusive).
test_cases.actual_result: Record dated 07/10/2026 (End Date) was included in the 06/20/2026-07/10/2026 range results.
test_cases.comments: Boundary check confirmed inclusive on End Date.

test_cases.description: Verify correct empty-state handling when no invoices fall within the selected range.
test_cases.expected_result: Table shows 'No Data Found' / empty state, not an error or unrelated records.
test_cases.actual_result: Table correctly showed 'No Data Found' and 'Showing 0 to 0 of 0 results' for range 06/11/2026-06/11/2026.
test_cases.comments: Empty-state handled correctly, no error thrown.

test_cases.description: Verify clearing the date range restores the full unfiltered invoice list.
test_cases.expected_result: Table returns to showing all invoice records as it does by default.
test_cases.actual_result: Confirmed full list restored after clearing filter.
test_cases.comments: No regressions observed after clearing filter.

test_cases.description: Verify pagination (Previous/Next, results count) reflects the filtered date range, not the full unfiltered dataset.
test_cases.expected_result: Result count and pagination reflect only the filtered records within the date range.
test_cases.actual_result: Confirmed pagination and result count matched filtered records.
test_cases.comments: Pagination count consistent with filtered dataset.
